seoTitle: Summer Hill Creek vs Summer Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Summer Hill Creek and Summer Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Summer Hill Creek vs Summer Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Summer Hill Creek and Summer Island.
heading: Summer Hill Creek vs Summer Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Summer Hill Creek, New South Wales and Summer Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Summer Island has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Summer Hill Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Summer Hill Creek or Summer Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Summer Hill Creek has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Summer Island scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Summer Hill Creek scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Summer Island scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Summer Hill Creek or Summer Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Summer Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
